text.title: Fine-tune cost vs prompt decision — worked example
text.summary: A worked decision where prompt-improve beats fine-tune at 50k req/day support classifier.

section.title: Context
section.p: Workload: support-ticket classifier, 50k req/day. Baseline (current Sonnet prompt): F1 = 0.78, $3/k tokens. Goal: cut cost without dropping quality.
Product owner pre-commits `lift_bar = 0.03` (anything below is not worth the engineering).

list.item: Fine-tune Haiku: training cost ~$800, hosting $0.5/k. Estimated lift +0.02 F1 (from a 1k-example pilot).
Prompt-improve (better few-shot + structured output): $0 training, $3/k stays. Estimated lift +0.04 F1 (from a 200-prompt A/B).
Hybrid (prompt-improve + Haiku route for low-confidence): training $0, blended $/k drops to $1.8 in shadow. Estimated lift +0.04 F1 + 40% cost cut.

section.title: Decision
section.p: Fine-tune lift (+0.02) does NOT meet lift_bar (0.03). Strong signals: only `data-volume-5k+` (we have 6k). Single signal → r3 blocks fine-tune.
Prompt-improve lift (+0.04) clears the bar with zero training cost. Hybrid adds the cost cut.

section.title: Final record
section.code: { "workload": "support-classifier", "owner": "alice.chen@example.com", "created_at": "2026-05-22", "recheck_at": "2026-11-22", "lift_bar": 0.03, "baseline": {"score": 0.78, "cost_per_k_tokens": 3.0, "daily_volume": 50000}, "candidate": {"training_cost": 0, "hosting_cost_per_k_tokens": 1.8, "training_examples": 0}, "break_even_months": null, "strong_signals": [], "recommendation": "hybrid", "narrative": "Prompt-improve + Haiku route clears lift_bar with no training spend. FT pilot returned only +0.02 lift, below bar. Recheck if volume jumps 3x or Anthropic adds Sonnet 4.6 with $1.5/k pricing." }

section.title: Six-month recheck (2026-11-22)
section.p: Trigger date arrives. Re-run with new pricing. If Sonnet 4.6 ships at $1.5/k, prompt-only beats hybrid; if not, hybrid carries forward. Record is renewed (parent_version = previous record id), not deleted.
